mapper.sql: G.ccg_id , G.ccg_nm , G.ccg_cls_nm , G.ccg_biz_area_nm , G.ccg_desc , G.ccg_status_scope_nm , G.ccg_use_rcmd_nm , G.ccg_rmrk , G.ccg_use_yn , TO_CHAR(G.ccg_regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT , COUNT(C.cc_cd) AS CODE_COUNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(C.cc_use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_CODE_COUNT
C.cc_ccg_id , C.cc_cd , C.cc_nm , C.cc_desc , C.cc_sort_sn , C.cc_external_yn , C.cc_end_yn , C.cc_rmrk , C.cc_use_yn , TO_CHAR(C.cc_regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM com_code_grp G LEFT JOIN com_code C ON C.cc_ccg_id = G.ccg_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( UPPER(G.ccg_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(G.ccg_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(G.ccg_desc) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(G.ccg_rmrk) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND G.ccg_use_yn = #{useYn}
GROUP BY G.ccg_id , G.ccg_nm , G.ccg_cls_nm , G.ccg_biz_area_nm , G.ccg_desc , G.ccg_status_scope_nm , G.ccg_use_rcmd_nm , G.ccg_rmrk , G.ccg_use_yn , G.ccg_regist_dt ORDER BY G.ccg_id ASC

SELECT
FROM com_code_grp G LEFT JOIN com_code C ON C.cc_ccg_id = G.ccg_id WHERE G.ccg_id = #{ccgId} GROUP BY G.ccg_id , G.ccg_nm , G.ccg_cls_nm , G.ccg_biz_area_nm , G.ccg_desc , G.ccg_status_scope_nm , G.ccg_use_rcmd_nm , G.ccg_rmrk , G.ccg_use_yn , G.ccg_regist_dt
